rows.protocol_note: Official OpenAI GPT-5.6 release-page comparison table dated 2026-07-09. The table does not state one common reasoning effort for every model; rows remain protocol_variant. Latency and API cost are estimated from production behavior and offline simulation, with latency at fast API speeds and cost at regular API pricing. This prose-highlight value is kept separately from the 52.7 ordinary Sol table value; Ultra coordinates four agents by default.
